final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [1:0] B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input E,
    output X
);assign X = ((A <= 5) && (B == 2)) ? 1 :
               ((C == 1) && (D == 0) && (E == 1)) ? 1 : 0;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X = ~((A > 5) || (B != 2));
      X = ~(~C || D || ~E);
    end
  end

endmodule
